name: travelgo
description: TravelGo - 智慧旅遊規劃 App

scripts.build: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');function copyDir(s,d){fs.mkdirSync(d,{recursive:true});for(const f of fs.readdirSync(s)){const sp=path.join(s,f),dp=path.join(d,f);if(fs.statSync(sp).isDirectory()){if(!['node_modules','ios','www','.git'].includes(f))copyDir(sp,dp)}else{fs.copyFileSync(sp,dp)}}}['index.html','manifest.json','sw.js'].forEach(f=>{if(fs.existsSync(f))fs.copyFileSync(f,'www/'+f)});['css','js','icons'].forEach(d=>{if(fs.existsSync(d))copyDir(d,'www/'+d)});console.log('Build: copied to www/')"
scripts.cap:sync: npm run build && npx cap sync
